objective: Map all physical connection edges for the interior cabin dashboard assembly (steering column ↔ structural frame cross-member).
success_criteria: Ingest and log every BOLTED_TO, MOUNTED_TO, and ROUTES_THROUGH edge connecting the steering column assembly to the structural frame cross-member — each with hashed supporting documentation.
evidence_required: BOLTED_TO edges with torque metadata when applicable
ROUTES_THROUGH edges for harness/fluid paths at column/cross-member interface
notes: Parallel to MISN-000001 (door harness EWD) — do not starve KG-001.
Dashboard edge mapping uses EGS-v1 vocabulary only.
Steering column edges must not invent TAS65 applicability without prior config proof.
